name: Selic Corp Public Company Limited
summary: Selic Corp Public Company Limited produces and distributes industrial adhesives in Thailand. The company offers hot melt, water based, and solvent based adhesives; and services, such as sample testing, consultation, recommendation, production line audit, foundation training, and other services. It also produces and distributes self-adhesive labels; and wholesales industrial chemicals. The company serves various industries, such as leather and shoes, furniture, packaging and labelling, food and beverage, printing, woodworking, automotive parts, etc. It also exports its products to Asia, Africa, Australia, the Middle East, South America, and New Zealand. The company was founded in 1979 and is based in Bangkok, Thailand.
